data.title: Add sentinel file write to brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3
data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3 contains sentinel write instruction
  Verify: grep -q "brainstorm-sentinel" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sentinel write is placed AFTER Step 3 (ticket health validated) and BEFORE Step 4a (complexity evaluator dispatch)
  Verify: python3 -c "
import re
content = open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md').read()
sentinel_pos = content.find('brainstorm-sentinel')
step4a_pos = content.find('Step 4a')
assert sentinel_pos > 0, 'sentinel not found'
assert step4a_pos > 0, 'Step 4a not found'
assert sentinel_pos < step4a_pos, 'sentinel must come before Step 4a'
print('PASS')
"
- [ ] Sentinel uses get_artifacts_dir() for session-scoped path
  Verify: grep -A5 "brainstorm-sentinel" plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | grep -q "get_artifacts_dir\|ARTIFACTS_DIR"

## Implementation Details
Add a sentinel file write instruction to brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 3, placed after Step 3 (Validate Ticket Health) and before Step 4a (Dispatch Complexity Evaluator). This is the last point where Phase 3 work is complete but no downstream skill invocation has fired.

The instruction should read:
```bash
# Write brainstorm completion sentinel (session-scoped)
source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/deps.sh"
ARTIFACTS_DIR=$(get_artifacts_dir)
echo "brainstorm-complete" > "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/brainstorm-sentinel"
```

CRITICAL: The sentinel MUST be the last Phase 3 action before downstream skill invocation. If brainstorm crashes after sentinel write but before completion, the sentinel is a false certificate.

## TDD Requirement
RED eval from task (previous) must pass (GREEN) after this modification.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md (modify)
